chain.thought: Explanation: The “top honor” refers to the MVP. Scanning the MVP column, the only back-to-back winner is Mauro Biello in 1997 and 1998; no other individual has consecutive MVP awards.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
In this context, the "top honor" is the MVP. Reviewing the MVP column:
- 1997: Mauro Biello
- 1998: Mauro Biello
No other individual appears in consecutive years. Therefore, the only person to win the top honor in consecutive years is Mauro Biello.
